zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Fougères於大約1150年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯時，他的父親Raoul II de Fougeres23歲，母親Jeanne De Dol19歲。他於1168年之前與Agatha du Hommet結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1187年6月14日在法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯福格雷斯享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Fougères于大约1150年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯时，他的父亲Raoul II de Fougeres23岁，母亲Jeanne De Dol19岁。他于1168年之前与Agatha du Hommet结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1187年6月14日在法国波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯福格雷斯享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fougères
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Armand, Emile, Fleurette, Thierry.

French (Fougère): topographic name for someone who lived in a place densely grown with ferns, from Old French foug(i)ere ‘fern, bracken’ (from Late Latin filicaria); or a habitational name from (La) Fougère, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Fugere .

History: Jean Fougère from Poupry in Eure-et-Loir, France, married first Marie Bourg in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada) in 1713, and second Marie-Madeleine Belliveau in Port-Toulouse (St. Peters), NS, Canada, c. 1728.

variants.name: Fugere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Celine, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Normand, Philippe, Pierre, Sylvian.
French (Fugère): variant of Fougère (see Fougere ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Fougères was born about 1150, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Raoul II de Fougeres, was 23 and his mother, Jeanne De Dol, was 19. He married Agatha du Hommet before 1168. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 14 June 1187, in Fougeres, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Fougères est né environ 1150, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Raoul II de Fougeres, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Jeanne De Dol, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Agatha du Hommet avant 1168. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 14 juin 1187, à Fougeres, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Fougères um 1150 in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul II de Fougeres 23 und seine Mutter Jeanne De Dol 19. Er hat vor 1168 Agatha du Hommet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Juni 1187 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Fougeres, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Fougères è nato il circa 1150 nel Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Raoul II de Fougeres, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne De Dol, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Agatha du Hommet prima del 1168. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 giugno 1187, nel Fougeres, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Fougèresが約1150年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインフォウグeレスで生まれた時，父Raoul II de Fougeresは23歳，母Jeanne De Dolは19歳であった。1168年以前にAgatha du Hommetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1187年6月14日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツデウクス-スevレスフォウギレスで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Fougères(이)가 대략 1150년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul II de Fougeres(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne De Dol(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1168년 이전 Agatha du Hommet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1187년 6월 14일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 데우스-스e브레스 포우그레스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Fougères nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Raoul II de Fougeres, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne De Dol, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Agatha du Hommet antes 1168. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de junho de 1187, em Fougeres, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Fougères родился около 1150 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul II de Fougeres было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne De Dol, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Agatha du Hommet перед 1168 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 14 июня 1187 г. в местности фоугиресь, деукс-сeвресь, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Fougères nació aproximadamente 1150, en Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Raoul II de Fougeres, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Jeanne De Dol, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Agatha du Hommet antes de 1168. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de junio de 1187, en Fougeres, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 38 años.
